name: WeLoveManga
notes: Overrides getChapters + getPages (real parsing methods). The chapter list is fetched from an ajax fragment cont.Listchapter.php?mid={mid} (mid read from 'div.cmt input') whose rows wrap an inner <a>, and the page list from cont.listImg.php?cid={cid} (cid from '#chapter'). Fully datafied via chaptersAjaxUrl + chapterLinkSelector + pagesAjaxUrl; no residual custom code needed.

name: Klz9
notes: NOT representable by FmreaderEngine. Klz9 replaces the entire pipeline (getListPage/getDetails/getChapters/getPages) with a private JSON API (/api/manga/list, /api/manga/slug/{slug}, /api/chapter/{id}) that requires per-request auth headers x-client-ts + x-client-sig = SHA-256(timestamp + '.' + clientSecret). The clientSecret and crypto signing cannot be expressed as pure HTML/selector data and demand a dedicated engine. Row kept for inventory; config is a stub and this source will not function on the generic engine.

name: OlimpoScans
notes: NOT an FmreaderParser. Although it lives in the site/fmreader/es folder, OlimpoScans extends PagedMangaParser directly and is a bespoke JSON API (dashboard.{domain}/api/series, /api/rankings, /api/new-chapters, /api/capitulo/...) with its own pagination, ranking-based popular feed, comic-type filtering and ISO date parsing. None of it maps to the Fmreader HTML pipeline; it needs its own dedicated engine. Row kept for inventory only.
